login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to manage your job hunting or hiring journey.
login.failed: Unable to sign in. Please check your credentials.
login.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
login.promoTitle: Find the right job for you
login.promoDescription: Access thousands of job opportunities from leading companies in Vietnam

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Create a candidate or employer account to get started.
register.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 2 characters
register.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
register.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
register.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
register.promoDescription: Sign up now to explore thousands of attractive job opportunities.
register.testimonialQuote: "CanPany helped me land my dream job in just 2 weeks!"
register.termsPrefix: By signing up, you agree to our
